FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#67 67th-69th-71st buses (Western Terminal) are temporarily rerouted in both directions near , due to street blockage near 69th/Bell. 

Westbound buses will operate via 69th, Damen, 71st, Western and 69th including the normal route streets.

Eastbound buses buses will operate via Western, Marquette, Damen and 69th.

Allow extra travel time.
